releaseNotes: • TV: the 30 fps playback cap for low-RAM boxes (e.g. onn 4K Plus) now actually engages. The previous build requested it in a form the video engine on these devices rejected, so 60 fps streams kept playing at full rate and the judder remained. It is now applied via the correct filter, and a related glitch where the rejected request could briefly reconnect the stream when tuning a channel is fixed.
